case_title: GUY SHAHINE VS. SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED - THIRD PARTY AS TO DEFENDANT KOEHLER, TRACY HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-21-2018 - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-03-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-01-2018
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY SHAHINE, GUY AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2018 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-23-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR GUY SHAHINE IS PRESENT. THIRD PARTY ORDERED TO APPEAR TRACY KOEHLER (OWNER SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.) IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF GUY SHAHINE. DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PETE GARCIA, MANANGER. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY SHAHINE, GUY SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAHINE, GUY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC. $675.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $740.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAHINE, GUY AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF SHAHINE, GUY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2018 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-06-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 JUDGMENT CREDITOR GUY SHAHINE IS PRESENT. THIRD PARTY ORDERED TO APPEAR TRACY KOEHLER (OWNER SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.) IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO CONTINUE IN ORDER TO ALLOW TIME FOR PAYMENT OF ENTIRE JUDGMENT AMOUNT BY CHECK FOR VERIFICATION OF FUNDS THAT IS REQUIRED BY BANKING INSTITUTION BEFORE MONIES IS DEPOSITED INTO ACCOUNT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE SEPTEMBER HEARING, EXAMINATION TO BE DISCHARGED AS JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: PAUL ALVARADO; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH CITY TOW, INC.
ORDER RE: DISCHARGE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
